action.reasoning: Observation: continue_train.py crashed because the training loop passed a malformed attention mask into WavLM; visible code shows a mismatch between collate output and loop unpacking. Analysis: before editing, I need exact current model.forward signature and the collate/training sections to patch correctly without breaking the working checkpoint/predict pipeline. Decision: inspect only the relevant compact sections of model.py and continue_train.py, then patch and resume training next iteration.
